title: Divine Dimensions
description: A Modpack that regroups many mods to add a ton biomes and dimensions to the game, revamps the existing ones.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ddb4a6dd67b064866e2ac4115c882400224946e6.png)

# 

_A Modpack that regroups many mods to add a ton of biomes and dimensions to the game, revamps the existing ones._ 

### Explore the Overworld with new biomes, structures and creatures that will add more difficulty to the game ; explore it to uncover it's secrets and new mysteries to dive into the revamped Nether, The End and with the new dimensions that have been added to game that will put you to more challenges and make you earn rewards from the bosses you'll find there.

_There's about 100+ new biomes and 20+ new dimensions added to the game with this modpack._

### If you seek to explore new worlds and challenging environments, this modpack is made for you. 

#
